    FILE_GENERATED_BY - Static variable in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.controller.DataRetrievalController
     
    FILE_GENERATOR - Static variable in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.controller.DataRetrievalController
     
    filterAcribisConsentWithValidMainConsent(List, List) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.AcribisDataItemGenerator
    Filters the list of Acribis consents, keeping only those with a valid PatientId in both the provided lists of valid PatDataUsage and valid Recontacting consents.
    filterConditionsByRecordDate(List, Date) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirConditionTools
    Filters a list of UKB conditions to include only those that have a recorded date after the specified reference date.
    filterDataItemsByThreshold(List, Map) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ThresholdCheck
    Filters a list of DiseaseDataItem based on threshold values.
    filterEncounterByAge(List, List, int) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.tools.EncounterFilter
     
    filterEncounterByStatus(List, GlobalConfiguration) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DataItemGenerator
    Filters out encounters with invalid status, unless explicitly allowed via configuration.
    filterEncountersByIds(List, Set) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.tools.EncounterFilter
    Filters encounters based on a set of IDs.
    filterPatientByExistingEncounter(List, List) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.tools.PatientFilter
    Filters a list of patients based on the patient IDs present in the given encounters.
    filterPatientsByAge(List, List) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.AcribisDataItemGenerator
    Filters patients by checking whether they were under 18 years old at the time of signing any associated consent.
    filterProceduresByIcuWardCheck(List, List) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.tools.ProcedureFilter
    Filters ICU procedures based on whether the linked case contains at least one icu stay in its supply contact encounter resource.
    filterProceduresByRecordDate(List, Date) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirProcedureTools
    Filters procedures to include only those that were performed after the provided reference date.
    findClosestObject(List, long) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.predictiondata.ukb.renalreplacement.misc.ValueOperations
     
    flagEncounters(List, List, List, InputCodeSettings, QualitativeLabCodesSettings, DataItemContext) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.DiseaseDetectionManagement
    Marks all encounters in the given list as SARS-CoV-2-positive or /-borderline or /-negative (Exclusion via negative diagnostic code), as far as this information can be determined from the corresponding observation and condition resources.
    flagEncountersByIdentifierValue(Set, List, Extension) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirTools
    Filters a list of UkbEncounter objects based on their official identifier values and adds a given extension to each filtered encounter.
    FlaggingExtension - Class in de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.enums
     
    FlaggingExtension() - Constructor for class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.enums.FlaggingExtension
     
    flattenKjpCoreCases(Map) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DashboardDataItemLogic
